nasb.text: When they have completed the days, it shall be that on the eighth day and onward, the priests shall offer your burnt offerings on the altar, and your peace offerings; and I will accept you,’ declares the Lord God.”

esv.text: And when they have completed these days, then from the eighth day onward the priests shall offer on the altar your burnt offerings and your peace offerings, and I will accept you, declares the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 滿了七天，從第八天起，祭司們要在祭壇上獻你們的燔祭和平安祭。我那時必悅納你們；這是主耶和華的宣告。”

ccb.text: 从第八天开始，祭司要在祭坛上献你们的燔祭和平安祭，我必悦纳你们。这是主耶和华说的。’”
